name: ExtensionMedicinalProductDefinition_Characteristic
title: R5: Key product features such as "sugar free", "modified release" (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicinalProductDefinition.characteristic` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicinalProductDefinition.characteristic` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.characteristic` 0..* `BackboneElement`
*  R4B: `MedicinalProductDefinition.characteristic` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.characteristic` has a context of MedicinalProduct based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicinalProduct`.
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.characteristic` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
